\tzpentry{ID3313}{Chemical Potential Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3313 introduces Chemical Potential Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} ds^2_{(5)} = g_{ \mu \nu}^{(4)}dx^ \mu dx^ \nu + e^{2 \sigma} \left(dy + A_ \mu dx^ \mu \right)^2 \end{equation}
